name: System Payment SEPA
description: Creates and dispatches SEPA payment instructions.

name: System Payment SWIFT
description: Creates and dispatches SWIFT payment instructions.

name: Payment Processing Core
description: Tracks instructions, compliance release decisions and final payment status.

name: Sanctions Monitoring
description: Screens payments against sanctions, restricted parties and unusual-risk alerts; produces release decisions.

name: Compliance Market Abuse Surveillance
description: Monitors trading activity patterns and generates compliance-review alerts.

name: Settlement & Reconciliation Platform
description: Reconciles internal payment status with settlement confirmations and account movement.

name: Ticketing System
description: Tracks incidents, service requests, investigations and resolutions for teams.

name: System Manager Identity
description: Manages user identities, permissions and access-review evidence.

name: Input Hub System
description: Ingests and normalises external feeds for consuming compliance and payment systems.

name: Innovation Sandbox
description: Supports assessment and prototyping of future technology opportunities.
